headline: Why Consolidated Edison (ED) is a Top Dividend Stock for Your Portfolio
summary: Dividends are one of the best benefits to being a shareholder, but finding a great dividend stock is no easy task. Does Con Ed (ED) have what it takes? Let's find out.
